label: BLJ_label
reason: Across the 41-frame clip the camera whips rapidly along a brick wall before Mario abruptly pops up from the square opening and lands on the grated platform, covering a large distance in only a few frames while in long‑jump frames and moving backward relative to normal traversal. This abrupt, high-speed backward motion matches the base BLJ. The setting is not the lobby pillars, castle stairs, or HMC elevator, so it is not LBLJ, SBLJ, or the HMC BLJ strat.
